html:
Exclusive to:

This article is incomplete because of the evil sabotage by Maxwell....
Please help to improve the article, or discuss the issue with the community on the talk page according to the talk page etiquette or on our Discord.

The Cork Candle Hat is a craftable Hat Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Light Tab, requires 4 Cork and 2 Iron Ore to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype. It serves as a light source providing a slightly smaller radius of light than the Torch.

The greatest differences from the Torch, and what justifies the use of better ingredients, is that it can be refueled with Cork for 37.5% (45s) and be worn on the head. This allows for infinite use and frees the handslot for other Tools or Weapons.

Unlike the Torch, the durability drainage is not affected by Rain, however it still provides 20% wetness resistance when equipped.

 Trivia

  • Clicking the Cork Candle Hat with the Left Mouse Button rapidly while it is equipped will cause the item not to lose its durability.


Gallery

  • Wilba wearing a Cork Candle Hat.
  • Wheeler wearing a Cork Candle Hat.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

“What a bright idea!”
–Wilson

–Webber
“Sweet. Now my hands are free.”
–Walani

–Warly
“A fine hat fer lootin' temples.”
–Woodlegs
“ON, ON, BRIEF CANDLE!”
–Wilba
“Scary head thing!”
–Wormwood
“Swell. I feel completely safe with an open flame on my head.”
–Wheeler
The Cork Candle Hat is a craftable Hat Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Light Tab, requires 4 Cork and 2 Iron Ore to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype. It serves as a light source providing a slightly smaller radius of light than the Torch.
The greatest differences from the Torch, and what justifies the use of better ingredients, is that it can be refueled with Cork for 37.5% (45s) and be worn on the head. This allows for infinite use and frees the handslot for other Tools or Weapons.
Unlike the Torch, the durability drainage is not affected by Rain, however it still provides 20% wetness resistance when equipped.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Clicking the Cork Candle Hat with the Left Mouse Button rapidly while it is equipped will cause the item not to lose its durability.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Mũ nến Cork là một Vật phẩm Mũ có thể chế tạo độc quyền trong Hamlet DLC. Nó được tìm thấy trong Thẻ Ánh Sáng, cần 4 Nút Chai và 2 Quặng Sắt để chế tạo và Máy Khoa Học để tạo nguyên mẫu. Nó đóng vai trò như một nguồn sáng cung cấp bán kính ánh sáng nhỏ hơn một chút so với Đuốc.

The '''Cork Candle Hat''' is a craftable [[:Category:Hats|Hat]] [[Item]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found in the [[Light Tab]], requires 4 [[Cork]] and 2 [[Iron Ore]] to craft, and a [[Science Machine]] to prototype. It serves as a light source providing a slightly smaller radius of light than the [[Torch]].

The greatest differences from the [[Torch]], and what justifies the use of better ingredients, is that it can be refueled with [[Cork]] for 37.5% (45s) and be worn on the head. This allows for infinite use and frees the handslot for other [[Tools]] or [[Weapons]].

Unlike the [[Torch]], the durability drainage is not affected by [[Rain]], however it still provides 20% [[wetness]] resistance when equipped.

=={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* Clicking the Cork Candle Hat with the Left Mouse Button rapidly while it is equipped will cause the item not to lose its durability.
